attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WBSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
 WBSOA.SS_CD, 
 WBSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 WBSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 WBSOA.SVC_CONTRACT_LINE_START_DT, 
 WBSOA.SVC_CONTRACT_LINE_END_DT, 
 WBSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT, 
 WBSOA.CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG, 
 WBSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT, 
 WBSOA.BOOKINGS_PCT, 
 WBSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY, 
 WBSOA.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 WBSOA.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 WBSOA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 WBSOA.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 WBSOA.START_TV_DTM, 
 WBSOA.END_TV_DTM,
 WBSOA.EXCEPTION_REASON_CD,
 WBSOA.EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD,
 WBSOA.ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG,
 WBSOA.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 WBSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WBSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 WBSOA.EXCEPTION_DETAIL_DESCR,
 WBSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY,/* prmaddal : Added as part of SOT OA-Q1FY17*/
 WBSOA.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  /* prmaddal : Added as part of SOT OA-Q1FY17*/
 FROM $$WORKDB.W_BATCH_SOL_OFFER_ATRBTN WBSOA
 WHERE WBSOA.DML_TYPE='I'

SELECT 
 NBSOATV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
 NBSOATV.SS_CD, 
 NBSOATV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 NBSOATV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY, 
 NBSOATV.SVC_CONTRACT_LINE_START_DT, 
 NBSOATV.SVC_CONTRACT_LINE_END_DT, 
 NBSOATV.ATTRIBUTION_PCT, 
 NBSOATV.CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG, 
 NBSOATV.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT, 
 NBSOATV.BOOKINGS_PCT, 
 NBSOATV.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY, 
 NBSOATV.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 NBSOATV.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 NBSOATV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 NBSOATV.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 NBSOATV.EXCEPTION_REASON_CD,
 NBSOATV.EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD,
 NBSOATV.ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG,
 NBSOATV.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 NBSOATV.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NBSOATV.ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
 NBSOATV.EXCEPTION_DETAIL_DESCR,
 NBSOATV.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY,/* prmaddal : Added as part of SOT OA-Q1FY17*/
 NBSOATV.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  /* prmaddal : Added as part of SOT OA-Q1FY17*/
 FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BATCH_SOL_OFFER_ATRBTN_TV NBSOATV
 WHERE CAST(NBSOATV.END_TV_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0))='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
